title: patrisa canescens
intro: Patrisa canescens, also known as Patrisa fragrans, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Icacinaceae. The medicinal properties of Patrisa canescens include its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve flatulence, making it a popular remedy for gastrointestinal issues. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The herbal preparations of Patrisa canescens typically involve its leaves and flowers being dried and then used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
